question: What is the position of the red car in the image? Select from the following options: (A) Centered in the middle of the image. (B) In the foreground, left side of the image. (C) In the background, right side of the image. (D) Cannot be determined.
gold_answer: Centered in the middle of the image
answer_choices: Centered in the middle of the image
In the foreground, left side of the image
In the background, right side of the image
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
